metadata.name: Remove a Vehicle from an Auto Policy

description: A policyholder sold a car and no longer needs it on their policy.

nodes.task_description: Identify the policyholder and the specific vehicle to be removed.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the account and the vehicle.

nodes.task_description: Remove the vehicle from the policy, effective today.
Recalculate the premium and inform the customer of their new, lower payment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides the customer with their new premium amount.
